### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/runtime-spec (github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec)</summary>

### [`v1.2.0`](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/releases/tag/v1.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/compare/v1.1.0...v1.2.0)

Votes: [#​1242](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1242)

##### Additions

-   config: add idmap and ridmap mount options ([#​1222](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1222))
-   config.md: allow empty mappings for \[r]idmap ([#​1224](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1224))
-   features-linux: Expose idmap information ([#​1219](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1219))
-   mount: Allow relative mount destinations on Linux ([#​1225](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1225))
-   features: add potentiallyUnsafeConfigAnnotations ([#​1205](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1205))
-   config: add support for org.opencontainers.image annotations [#​1197](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1197)

##### Minor fixes:

-   config: improve bind mount and propagation doc ([#​1228](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1228))

##### Documentation, CI & Governance:

-   fix link to hooks in features ([#​1226](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1226))
-   specs-go: add missing deprecation comment for Hooks.Prestart ([#​1232](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1232))
-   specs-go: mark LinuxMemory.Kernel as deprecated ()[#​1233](https://togithub.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec/issues/1233))

</details>
